raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against Barclays for a failure to conduct a reasonable investigation of a billing error under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). 

On XX/XX/2026, I purchased a jacket and t-shirt from XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$340.00}. Upon receiving the items, I discovered they were counterfeit and immediately initiated a dispute on XX/XX/2026. 

I provided Barclays with a definitive third-party 'NOT AUTHENTIC ' verdict from Real Authentication ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ). Under Visa Dispute Reason Code XXXX ( XXXX ), this third-party evidence is the specific requirement to win a claim and voids any individual merchant return policy. 

Despite this evidence, Barclays issued a denial on XX/XX/2026, misclassifying the case as 'insufficient proof of cancellation. ' I sent a formal rebuttal via Certified Mail on XX/XX/2026, highlighting their error and resubmitting the authentication report. Barclays has ignored this evidence and issued a final denial on XX/XX/2026, threatening to report this to credit bureaus. 

I am requesting that Barclays follow federal law and XXXX network rules to reverse this fraudulent charge immediately.
